positive: A mystical, stylized cosmic flora illustration. Central composition featuring blooming, bioluminescent fantasy flowers interwoven with geometric mandalas and crescent moons. The style is graphic novel meets vintage tiki art, rendered in deep sapphire blue, electric teal, burnt orange, and cosmic violet. Focus on clean, sharp silhouettes and strong linework. The elements should appear to grow out of a circular, negative-space background, suitable for placement on t-shirts or sweatshirts. High contrast, vector art aesthetic, maximalist yet organized.
